name: Sunshine Oilsands Ltd.
summary: Sunshine Oilsands Ltd. engages in the evaluation and development of oil sands leases in the Athabasca region of Alberta, Canada. Its portfolio of oil sands leases consists of three asset categories, including clastics, carbonates, and conventional heavy oil. The company's seven principal operating regions in the Athabasca area include West Ells, Thickwood, Legend Lake, Harper, Muskwa, Goffer, and Portage. It holds approximately 990,807 acres of leases in the Athabasca oil sands region. The company has 276 million barrels of proved plus probable reserves. Sunshine Oilsands Ltd. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Calgary, Canada.
